ItacPersonItem.Pseudonym: Giovanni Antonio Bumaldi | Joannes Antonius Bumaldus
ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Fantuzzi, he was the founder of the Accademia dei Vespertini. Montalbani is said to be co-academician in the introduction of `La quadriga del Sole` (Accademia degli Indomiti). In Cefalogia fisonomica (1630), he signs sonnet at p. 78 as `Intrepido Ac. Della Notte`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
